narrative.description: Beat Saber is a VR rhythm game where players slash colored blocks to the beat using two lightsabers, with difficulty tiers and custom song support.
narrative.core_loop: Select a song, slice incoming blocks in the correct direction on beat, avoid obstacles, and chase high scores across increasing difficulty maps.

mechanics.map_notes: In Beat Saber, notes scroll to a beat line; players tap, hold, or slide on precise timing windows.
mechanics.expression: In Beat Saber, notes scroll to a beat line; players tap, hold, or slide on precise timing windows.

mechanics.map_notes: In Beat Saber, consecutive successful inputs build a multiplier that boosts final score.
mechanics.expression: In Beat Saber, consecutive successful inputs build a multiplier that boosts final score.

mechanics.map_notes: In Beat Saber, short timed minigames rotate rapidly, each with unique one-shot rules.
mechanics.expression: In Beat Saber, short timed minigames rotate rapidly, each with unique one-shot rules.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Beat Saber through its core rhythm loop.
